C

capacity - Variable in class model.Edge
Maximum number of agents allowed on this edge
capacity - Variable in record class ui.CreateDialogs.EdgeData
The field for the capacity record component.
capacity() - Method in record class ui.CreateDialogs.EdgeData
Returns the value of the capacity record component.
CARGO - Enum constant in enum class model.AgentType
Agent carrying cargo; speed is reduced proportionally to the load weight.
CargoAgent - Class in model
Agent carrying cargo whose weight reduces its movement speed.
CargoAgent(int, Node, Node, double) - Constructor for class model.CargoAgent
Creates a cargo agent with the given load weight.
cargoWeight - Variable in class model.CargoAgent
Weight of the cargo carried by this agent (>= 0).
clampPoint(Point2D) - Method in class view.GraphView
Limits a complete point, meaning both x and y at the same time.
clampX(double) - Method in class view.GraphView
Set a limit on the horizontal axis to prevent the graph from extending beyond the ToolBox.
clampY(double) - Method in class view.GraphView
Set a limit on the vertical axis to prevent the graph from extending beyond the ToolBox.
clear() - Method in class model.Graph
Removes all nodes and edges from the graph.
clear() - Method in class ui.PatientPanel
Clears the panel and displays a default message.
clear() - Method in class ui.StatsPanel
Shows the general graph overview when nothing is selected.
clearAgents() - Method in class simulation.SimulationEngine
Removes all agents from the simulation and resets the simulation tick.
clearGraph() - Method in class controller.GraphController
Clears the graph completely so the user can start a new simulation.
clearGraphBtn - Variable in class ui.ToolBox
 
clearSelection() - Method in class view.GraphView
Clears the current selection (node or edge).
computeCost(Edge) - Method in class pathfinding.CongestionAwarePathFinder
Calcule le coût effectif d'une arête en tenant compte du type de route et du taux de congestion actuel.
computeSpeed(double) - Static method in class model.CargoAgent
 
computeSpeed(int) - Static method in class model.PriorityAgent
 
condition - Variable in class model.Patient
 
CONGESTION_AWARE - Enum constant in enum class pathfinding.PathFinderType
 
CongestionAwarePathFinder - Class in pathfinding
Pathfinder qui tient compte de la congestion des arêtes.
CongestionAwarePathFinder(Graph) - Constructor for class pathfinding.CongestionAwarePathFinder
 
congestionWaitCycles - Variable in class model.Node
Remaining congestion wait cycles (set to 2 when overcrowded)
conscious - Variable in class model.Patient
 
containsAgent(Agent) - Method in class model.Edge
Checks whether the given agent is currently on this edge.
containsAgent(Agent) - Method in class model.Node
Returns whether the given agent is on this node.
contentBox - Variable in class ui.StatsPanel
 
controller - package controller
 
create(AgentType, int, Node, Node) - Static method in class controller.AgentFactory
Creates an agent of the specified type using default parameters.

Creates an agent of the specified type with a custom numeric parameter.
create(PathFinderType, Graph) - Static method in class controller.PathFinderFactory
 
createAgentAtSelectedNode(SimulationEngine) - Method in class controller.GraphController
Creates an agent on the currently selected node and assigns a destination, speed and pathfinding algorithm.
createArrowHead(double, double, double, double) - Method in class view.GraphView
Creates a small arrowhead polygon at the end of an edge.

Contains creation dialogs used by the application.

css(String) - Method in class ui.ToolBox

currentEffectiveDistance - Variable in class model.Agent
 
currentPath - Variable in class model.Agent
